sections.biography-source-undefined:
Liu Yu was styled Bo’an.

He hailed from Tan county, Donghai commandery. He was a sixth-generational descendant of Emperor Guangwu of Han through the lineage of the Prince of Donghai, Liu Qiang.

full_text:
Liu Yu (Bo’an) 劉虞 (伯安)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yu (劉虞), styledBo’an (伯安), was born in Tan county, Donghai commandery. Quelled usurpers in the north. Quarreled with Gongsun Zan and died. Liu Yu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Liu Yu was styled Bo’an.
He hailed from Tan county, Donghai commandery. He was a sixth-generational descendant of Emperor Guangwu of Han through the lineage of the Prince of Donghai, Liu Qiang.
